description: Letter from Avraham b. Ṣedaqa, in Ashqelon, to Abū Saʿīd Netanʾel b. Ṣedaqa al-ʿAṭṭār, in Fustat. In Hebrew and Judaeo-Arabic, with the address in Arabic script. Dated: Elul 1427 Seleucid = August/September 1116 CE. Apart from the opening blessings, consists mainly of a request that the addressee pay 5 dinars to the sender's relative Abū l-Ḥasan Rajāʾ of Ashqelon. Cf. CUL Or.1080 J127 (PGPID 8896).
